title: In memory, August 2013
summary: Alice Amelia Carroll, 92 Alice Amelia Carroll passed away June 16 at Fairbanks Memorial Hospital in Fairbanks, Alaska. Ms. Carroll was born June 19, 1920, in Rampart, Alaska. title: TCF selected to manage major donation to support Alaska Native arts and culture
summary: The Alaska Native Heritage Center is a prior TCF project grant recipient. title: Cooking class series:  Dinner makes a difference
summary: Beginning in August, Southcentral Foundation (SCF) is offering cooking classes every Thursday from 5:30 p.m. to 7 p.m. in Anchorage at the SCF Health Education and Wellness Center located at 4201 Tudor Centre Drive. title: A word from the president, August 2013
summary: Wow! What a summer it has been here in Alaska – one of the brightest and warmest on record. It has been so rewarding to enjoy the long, sunny days that bring out the best of our beautiful region. As our Alaska shareholders can attest to after years of lukewarm summers – we deserve it! title: CIRI Golf Classic rewards community programs
summary: CIRI Board Members Doug Fifer, Michael Boling and Erik Frostad and CITC President Gloria O’Neill prepare to tee off. title: Federal permits signal progress for oil and gas work
summary: The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service took positive action for two companies involved in oil and gas exploration and development in the Kenai National Wildlife Refuge. title: Dividend distributions
summary: Elders’ Settlement Trust payments The third quarter CIRI Elders’ Settlement Trust payment of $450 is scheduled for September 13, with the final 2013 Elders’ payment scheduled for December 13. Original shareholders who are 65 years of age or older and who own at least one share of CIRI stock as of the distribution dates are eligible to receive the Elders Trust payments.
